event: admitted to a tertiary medical pediatric gastroenterology unit
diagnosed with UC (pancolitis, E4 localization, Mayo score 2)
Group A streptococcal rapid antigen test negative
right sided supraclavicular very painful edema
spleen palpable 1 cm below left costal margin
coagulation test results slightly out of reference range
neck ultrasound revealed complete thrombosis of right external and IJVs
neck MRI and MRI venography performed
partial thrombosis of right sigmoid and transverse sinus
chest and heart ultrasound revealed bilateral pleural effusion
F2 gene mutation G20210A c. *97G>A not found
FV Leiden c.1691G>A, p. Arg534GIn mutation not found
neck ultrasound and color doppler confirmed regression of thrombosis
active UC at time of thrombosis
